amendment.description: To prohibit the Department of Justice from using taxpayer funds to make settlement payments to individuals convicted of assaulting law enforcement officers on January 6, 2021.

action.text: Amendment SA 5457 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5457, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 54 - 45. Record Vote Number: 158.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(c) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5457.
Amendment SA 5457 proposed by Senator Coons to Amendment SA 5453.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5457 proposed by Senator Coons to Amendment SA 5453.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5457, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 54 - 45. Record Vote Number: 158.
